events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday, known for his smooth ballads and hits with The Commodores.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years young today! Raise a glass to the legendary Lionel Richie, still bringing us those feel-good vibes. What's your ultimate Lionel track?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! A true icon who taught us that girls just wanna have fun. What's your favourite Cyndi moment?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British pop superstar George Michael, born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: A Different Corner
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to resonate deeply with us all.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and influence remain undeniable. What's your go-to MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr, best known as the drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm and good vibes continue. Peace and love, Ringo!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic lead guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! His riffs continue to rock the world. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic lead singer of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first music video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles, forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: Radio Lives On
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Funny, isn't it? Radio is still very much alive and kicking!

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. A true Britpop masterpiece. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place on this day in 1969, becoming a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis' passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music and legend continue to inspire.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, the world lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. The guitar has never sounded the same since.

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer, songwriter, and musician Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend, Chrissie Hynde! Still a force to be reckoned with. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Biblical Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll attitude. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: 51 years of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and hope that still resonates today.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple released the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped and put a thousand songs in our pocket. A true game-changer!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to rewatch your favourite Bond flick and crank up those iconic theme tunes. Who's your ultimate 007?
